betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cyclotron§f bombards §belement powders§f with §belement boxes§f to create heavier elements. A reliable but expensive method for large-scale advanced material production.

§ePower Consumption:§f §e20 MHE/s§f - requires substantial energy infrastructure.

§eOperation:§f
• Insert element powders and element boxes
• Machine accelerates particles and bombards powders
• Creates heavier elements through nuclear transmutation
• §aCan produce §bAntimatter§f as a byproduct§f for certain operations

§eKey Products:§f
• Heavy elements not obtainable through chemical processing
• §bAntimatter§f for advanced fuel and end-game recipes
• §bIonized Particles§f for further processing

§aTips:§f
• Install §bmax-level Power Saving upgrades§f to reduce both recipe time and power consumption
• Install §bmax-level Speed upgrades§f for faster processing
• Consider automation - many recipes require bulk production
• Use the antimatter for §bBF Rocket Fuel§f or advanced research
